inline_comments.message:
Route file would get change to something like this:
<from uri="event-bus:mybus/?eventTopic=AAI-EVENT&consumer=#consumerBean"/>

and consumerBean would be defined in the bean xml file along with others like:   
<bean id="consumerBean" class="org.onap.aai.event.client.KafkaEventConsumer" >
      <constructor-arg name="hosts" value="host:port" />
      <constructor-arg name="topic" value="testing" />
      <constructor-arg name="groupId" value="test" />
  </bean>
